modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Can't log into USD account on Lenovo laptop.

full_description_text:  
So, the user is trying to sign in.  
They can't get into their USD account.  
It's a Lenovo laptop, running Windows 10.  
Just not working at all.
